# portfolio.pharns.com

> Security Program & GRC Engineering Portfolio by Pharns Genece

## About
Pharns Genece is a GRC Engineer, Cloud Security practitioner, and AAM cybersecurity specialist. This portfolio showcases security program design, compliance automation, detection engineering, and RF/drone security research.

## Key Projects
- GIAP™ — Governed Intake and Analysis Platform: Multi-agent GRC automation with n8n and CISO Assistant across 100+ frameworks
- TraceLock™ — Multi-Domain RF Threat Detection: Patent-pending 6-domain wireless monitoring (Wi-Fi/BLE/SDR/GPS/ADS-B)
- PCI-DSS Windows 11 Hardening: Endpoint compliance with audit-ready evidence delivered in <48 hours
- AWS Cloud Control Pack: S3 default-deny, GuardDuty pipelines, scoped IAM with CIS/NIST mapping
- AgenticOS — AI Agent Orchestration: Governed multi-agent security workflows

## Credentials
- B.S. Cybersecurity & Information Assurance (WGU, 2026)
- CompTIA Security+, CySA+, PenTest+, Network+, A+
- ISC2 SSCP (Associate), ITIL4, LPI
- FAA Part 107, HAM/GMRS Licensed
- USAF Veteran (Service-Disabled)

## Expertise
GRC Engineering, Cloud Security (AWS), Compliance Automation, Detection Engineering, NIST CSF, CIS Controls v8, PCI-DSS v4.0, SOC 2, ISO 27001, RF/Wireless Security, IoT Security, OSINT, Prompt Engineering
